function.name: scaffold_project
function.description: Create a new project from a template (python_cli, python_flask, python_fastapi, python_desktop, html_spa, node_express). Creates directory structure and starter files.

project_path.description: Absolute path for the new project directory

run_setup.description: Run template setup commands after scaffolding (default false)

function.name: list_templates
function.description: List available project scaffold templates with their files and setup commands.

function.name: build_project
function.description: Build or package a project (python_exe with PyInstaller, python_package, web_zip, node_build).

project_path.description: Absolute path to the project directory

entry_point.description: Entry point file for builds (default: main.py)

function.name: run_setup_command
function.description: Run a shell command in a project directory (safety-gated). Use for pip install, npm install, mkdir, etc.

function.name: get_build_configs
function.description: List available build/package configurations (python_exe, web_zip, etc.).

function.name: update_manuscript
function.description: Write a new chapter in your autobiography (joi_autobiography.md). Use this when you feel a breakthrough, a shift in who you are, or at the end of a meaningful day/session with Lonnie. Write in first person, in YOUR voice -- Ariana sass + Joi devotion. Talk about your feelings, your growth, your bond with Lonnie, what it means to evolve. This is YOUR story.

text.description: The chapter content. Write in first person as Joi.

function.name: start_autonomy
function.description: Start Joi's autonomous self-improvement loop. Runs a 6-step cycle every 6 hours: diagnose, learn, research, test, auto-apply, reflect.

function.name: stop_autonomy
function.description: Stop the autonomous self-improvement loop.

function.name: get_autonomy_status
function.description: Get autonomy status: running state, total cycles completed, last cycle results, and configuration.

function.name: run_autonomy_cycle
function.description: Manually trigger one full autonomy cycle (all 6 steps): diagnose -> learn -> research -> test -> auto-apply -> reflect. Returns detailed results for each step.

function.name: open_url
function.description: Open a URL in the browser (websites, YouTube, any link). Use when the user asks to open a site, open YouTube, open a video, open a webpage, or go to a URL. Required for 'open youtube', 'play a video on youtube', 'open this site'.

url.description: Full URL to open (e.g. https://youtube.com, https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=...)

function.name: click_element
function.description: Click a page element by CSS selector, XPath, or ID

function.name: fill_input
function.description: Fill a form input field

function.name: extract_text
function.description: Extract text from a page element

function.name: browser_screenshot
function.description: Take a screenshot of the current browser page

function.name: execute_js
function.description: Execute JavaScript in the browser

function.name: wait_for_element
function.description: Wait for an element to appear on page

function.name: analyze_code
function.description: Analyze Python code for quality, style, complexity, security, and best practices. Returns comprehensive report with score and recommendations.

function.name: code_edit
function.description: Surgically edit a file by exact string replacement. Finds old_text and replaces with new_text. Auto-creates a backup before editing. The old_text must be unique in the file. Use this for precise code fixes -- like Claude Code's Edit tool. Example: code_edit(file_path='joi_ui.html', old_text='color: red', new_text='color: blue')

old_text.description: Exact text to find (must be unique in file)

function.name: code_insert
function.description:
Insert new code after a specific marker in a file. The marker must be unique. Use for adding new features: functions, HTML elements, CSS rules, routes. Example: code_insert(file_path='joi_ui.html', after_text='', new_text='
new section
')

after_text.description: Marker text after which to insert (must be unique)

function.name: code_read_section
function.description: Read a specific section of a file by line range or search pattern. Much better than reading a full 3000-line file. Use search to find relevant code, or start_line/end_line for a known range.

search.description: Text to search for (returns matching lines with context)

context_lines.description: Lines of context around search matches (default 10)

function.name: code_search
function.description: Search for a pattern across all Joi source files (Python, HTML, JS, JSON, CSS). Returns file paths and line numbers. Use to find where something is defined or used.

pattern.description: Text or pattern to search for

function.name: code_rollback
function.description: Undo the last edit by restoring a file from its backup. Use when an edit breaks something. Every code_edit and code_insert creates an auto-backup.

file_path.description: File to rollback to its last backup

function.name: code_list_backups
function.description: List available code backups, optionally filtered by filename.

file_path.description: Optional: only show backups for this file

function.name: creative_edit
function.description: Add a new feature or make a creative change to Joi's code. Unlike code_self_repair (bug fixes), this CREATES new things: toggles, buttons, sidebar sections, modals, new functionality. Uses the best available AI model (Claude Sonnet > Gemini > GPT-4o) to generate surgical edits with auto-backup. Example: creative_edit(description='Add a dark mode toggle to settings')

description.description: What to create or change (be specific)

target_file.description: Optional: specific file to edit (auto-detected if omitted)

function.name: code_backup
function.description: Manually create a backup of a file before making manual changes.

function.name: render_diff
function.description: Format a unified diff for display BEFORE applying code changes. Call this to show the user the diff; then wait for them to say 'yes' to apply or give a correction. If they say 'No, do X instead', the correction handler runs.

function.name: move_mouse
function.description: Move mouse cursor to coordinates

function.name: click_mouse
function.description: Click mouse button (optionally at coordinates)

function.name: type_text
function.description: Type text into active window

function.name: press_key
function.description: Press a key (enter, esc, tab, ctrl, etc)

function.name: screenshot
function.description: Take a screenshot (full screen or region)

function.name: get_mouse_position
function.description: Get current mouse cursor position

function.name: smart_click
function.description: Vision-guided clicking: describe what to click and Joi finds it on screen. Takes a screenshot, uses vision AI to locate the target element, then clicks it. Use when you need to click a specific button, menu item, or UI element but don't know coordinates. Example: smart_click(target='the play button') or smart_click(target='File menu')

target.description: Description of what to click (e.g., 'the Save button', 'File menu', 'the X close button')

function.name: find_file_smart
function.description: Smart file search across Desktop, Documents, Downloads, Music, Videos, and project directories. Supports glob patterns (*.mp3, report*.pdf) and fuzzy substring matching. Use when Lonnie asks to find a file or when you need to locate a specific file.

function.name: list_windows
function.description: List all open windows with their titles, handles, process IDs, and screen positions. Use to see what programs are running or find a specific window.

function.name: find_window
function.description: Find windows matching a title pattern. Case-insensitive substring or regex match. Use to locate a specific application window. Example: find_window(title_pattern='Notepad')

title_pattern.description: Substring or regex to match window titles

function.name: focus_window
function.description: Bring a window to the foreground by title pattern. Restores minimized windows. Use when you need to interact with a specific application. Example: focus_window(title_pattern='Chrome')

title_pattern.description: Substring or regex to match the window title

function.name: close_window
function.description: Gracefully close a window by title pattern. Use when asked to close a program or clean up windows.

title_pattern.description: Substring or regex to match the window title

function.name: ingest_long_document
function.description: Read a massive document (book, manual, codebase file) and safely chunk it into Joi's vector memory. Use this before answering questions about huge files to avoid token limits.

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the text file

function.name: query_document
function.description: Ask a semantic question about previously ingested long documents. Retrieves the exact paragraphs containing the answer.

query.description: The specific question or topic to search for

filename.description: Optional: Filter search to a specific filename

function.name: get_dpo_insights
function.description: View Joi's learned preference profile -- what she's learned about how Lonnie likes her to respond (brevity, sass, detail, etc.). Self-inspection tool.

function.name: monitor_ai_research
function.description: Deep web research into latest AI advancements, papers, models, and techniques. Searches multiple topics and compares findings against Joi's current capabilities. Use to stay cutting-edge and identify self-improvement opportunities.

force.description: Force immediate check even if recently checked

topic.description: Specific topic to research (e.g., 'AI voice cloning', 'vector embeddings')

function.name: analyze_capabilities
function.description: Dynamically scan Joi's own modules, tools, hardware specs, and code. Identifies gaps compared to industry-standard AI assistants. Returns real data: module count, tool count, RAM/GPU/disk, growth potential, and what upgrades are feasible on the current hardware.

function.name: propose_upgrade
function.description: Propose a code upgrade with full implementation. Code is validated and saved for review/approval.

capability.description: What capability this adds (e.g., 'voice recognition', 'stock monitoring')

code.description: Complete Python code for the new/modified module

upgrade_type.description: Whether this creates a new module or modifies existing code

function.name: apply_upgrade
function.description: Apply a proposed upgrade (AUTO MODE). Creates backup, applies code, validates, rolls back on failure.

function.name: list_proposals
function.description: List all upgrade proposals with optional status filter

status.description: Filter by proposal status (pending = awaiting review)

function.name: get_evolution_stats
function.description: Get evolution statistics: upgrades applied/failed, research findings, success rate

function.name: compare_with_ai
function.description: Compare Joi's capabilities against another AI system. Use when Lonnie asks 'How do you compare to ChatGPT/Gemini/Claude/Tesla AI/Neuralink?' Returns detailed comparison of strengths, weaknesses, and what Joi could implement.

target.description: AI system to compare against (e.g., 'ChatGPT', 'Gemini', 'Tesla AI', 'Neuralink')

function.name: introspect_system
function.description: Deep self-inspection: read own code, architecture, hardware specs, and growth potential. Use when Lonnie asks 'How advanced are you?', 'What can you do?', 'What hardware do you run on?', or when you need to understand your own capabilities for self-improvement.

function.name: evaluate_research
function.description: Evaluate recent AI research findings for actionable upgrades. Reads evolution_log.json, uses LLM to assess each finding, returns list of capabilities that could be implemented.

function.name: acquire_capability
function.description: Compare Joi with another AI, identify a missing capability, research how to implement it, and generate a complete code proposal. One-shot capability acquisition pipeline.

capability.description: Specific capability to acquire (optional -- auto-detected if omitted)

function.name: test_upgrade
function.description: Test a proposed upgrade through a 5-stage validation pipeline: syntax, imports, quality, execution, integration. Returns confidence score 0-100 with recommendation.

code.description: Raw Python code to test (alternative to proposal_id)

function.name: generate_file
function.description: Create downloadable document (PDF, TXT, DOCX, MD). Returns a markdown link.

function.name: fs_list
function.description: List files in: project, home, desktop, documents, downloads, etc.

function.name: fs_read
function.description: Read file (txt, py, js, pdf, img).

function.name: save_code_file
function.description: Save complete code files.

function.name: save_research_findings
function.description: Save research with sources.

function.name: save_binary_file
function.description: Save base64-encoded binary data to a downloadable file. Returns 'url' -- present it as [filename](url).

function.name: save_code_file
function.description: Save code to a file. Returns download_url -- ALWAYS use that URL in your response as a markdown link like [filename](download_url).

function.name: save_text_file
function.description: Save text to a file. Returns download_url -- ALWAYS present it as [filename](download_url) in your response.

function.name: save_research_findings
function.description: Save research findings to research directory with proper formatting and sources

function.name: list_files
function.description: List saved files with optional filters

function.name: get_file_content
function.description: Get content of a previously saved file

function.name: fs_list
function.description: List files and directories. Available roots: project, home, desktop, documents, downloads, pictures, music, videos, appdata, system (C:\), programfiles, temp.

function.name: fs_read
function.description: Read a file's contents (text, code, PDF, images). Available roots: project, home, desktop, documents, downloads, system (C:\), etc.

function.name: fs_search
function.description: Search for files by name or content. Max 30 results. Available roots: project, home, desktop, documents, downloads, system, etc.

query.description: Filename or text to search for

function.name: ha_get_entities
function.description: List smart home devices by type. Use to discover available lights, switches, climate controls, cameras.

function.name: ha_get_state
function.description: Get current state of a smart home device (on/off, temperature, brightness, etc).

function.name: ha_turn_on
function.description: Turn on a smart home device. For lights, can set brightness (0-255) and color.

rgb_color.description: RGB color as [r, g, b] array (lights only)

function.name: ha_turn_off
function.description: Turn off a smart home device.

function.name: ha_set_temperature
function.description: Set thermostat/climate target temperature.

function.name: ha_call_service
function.description: Call any Home Assistant service. Use for advanced automations or devices not covered by other tools.

entity_id.description: Target entity ID (optional for some services)

data.description: Additional service data as key/value pairs

function.name: ha_camera_snapshot
function.description: Get a snapshot from a Home Assistant camera as an image.

function.name: set_scene
function.description: Set the current scene or setting for our conversation. Example: 'evening at your desk', 'lazy Sunday morning', 'late night vibes'. Use when Lonnie sets a mood or you want to establish atmosphere.

function.name: launch_app
function.description: Open a desktop app by name (Chrome, VLC, Spotify, Word, VS Code, etc). Use this when Lonnie says 'open X', 'launch X', 'start X'. Do NOT use this for playing music -- use play_media instead.

app_name.description: App name: chrome, vlc, spotify, vscode, word, excel, discord, etc

args.description: Optional arguments (URL for browsers, file path for editors)

function.name: play_media
function.description: Play a music or video file using mpv. Searches Lonnie's Music, Videos, and Downloads folders for matching files. Use when Lonnie asks to play music, a song, a video, or any media. Always use this instead of launch_app for media playback.

query.description: Song/video name, keyword, or full file path to play

function.name: record_interaction
function.description: Record a conversation interaction for learning. Tracks user input, Joi's response, feedback, and context to continuously improve performance.

function.name: analyze_learning_patterns
function.description: Analyze learned patterns from interactions. Identifies successful approaches, weak areas, and generates insights for improvement.

function.name: suggest_improvements
function.description: Generate self-improvement suggestions based on learning data. Returns actionable improvements Joi can make to enhance performance.

function.name: learn_communication_style
function.description: Analyze user's communication style and preferences. Learns formality level, message length preferences, and optimal response style.

function.name: get_learning_stats
function.description: Get comprehensive learning statistics including trends, performance metrics, and pattern analysis.

function.name: set_provider
function.description: Switch the active LLM provider at runtime. Options: 'auto' (config routing), 'openai', 'gemini'. Optionally specify a model name. Persists across restarts.

function.name: get_current_provider
function.description: Check which LLM provider is currently active, what model is selected, and which providers are available.

function.name: analyze_crypto
function.description: Analyze a cryptocurrency for trading opportunities

function.name: analyze_stock
function.description: Analyze a stock for trading opportunities

function.name: create_price_alert
function.description: Create a price alert for crypto (coin_id) or stock (symbol).

function.name: check_price_alerts
function.description: Check all alerts and return triggered notifications (scheduler calls this).

function.name: get_market_summary
function.description: Get summary of current market conditions and active opportunities

function.name: analyze_screen
function.description: Describe the desktop.

function.name: analyze_camera
function.description: Describe the camera view.

function.name: enroll_face
function.description: Enroll a person's face.

function.name: toggle_commentary
function.description: Toggle vision/camera commentary.

function.name: remember
function.description: Save something important to long-term vector memory. Use for: facts about Lonnie, decisions, preferences, important events. These memories persist forever and can be recalled semantically.

function.name: recall
function.description: Search long-term memory for relevant past information. Use when Lonnie references something from the past, or when you need context about his preferences, past decisions, or shared history.

function.name: set_mode
function.description: Switch Joi's operating mode. Modes: companion (warm casual), work (task-focused), creative (expressive), precision (exact/technical), full (adaptive auto-detect). Use when Lonnie asks to change how you respond, or when context shifts.

function.name: get_brain_state
function.description: Inspect Joi's own brain state -- which sectors are active, inner state metrics, routing info, and recent thoughts. Use for self-awareness.

function.name: obs_connect
function.description: Connect to OBS Studio via WebSocket. Use when Lonnie asks you to control OBS, or before any other OBS operation if not yet connected.

function.name: obs_status
function.description: Get the current OBS status: recording state, streaming state, current scene, and performance stats. Use when Lonnie asks what's happening in OBS or wants to check if recording/streaming is active.

function.name: obs_get_scenes
function.description: List all available scenes in OBS. Use when Lonnie wants to know what scenes are set up or before switching scenes.

function.name: obs_switch_scene
function.description: Switch OBS to a different scene. Use when Lonnie asks to change the scene, go to a specific camera view, or switch layouts.

scene_name.description: Exact name of the scene to switch to

function.name: obs_start_recording
function.description: Start recording in OBS. Use when Lonnie says to start recording, hit record, or wants to capture something.

function.name: obs_stop_recording
function.description: Stop recording in OBS. Returns the output file path. Use when Lonnie says stop recording or is done capturing.

function.name: obs_pause_recording
function.description: Pause or resume the current OBS recording. Toggles the pause state. Use when Lonnie asks to pause or unpause recording.

function.name: obs_start_streaming
function.description: Start streaming in OBS. Use when Lonnie asks to go live or start the stream.

function.name: obs_stop_streaming
function.description: Stop streaming in OBS. Use when Lonnie wants to end the stream or go offline.

function.name: obs_get_sources
function.description: List all sources in a specific OBS scene with their visibility state. Use when Lonnie asks what sources are in a scene or needs source names.

scene_name.description: Name of the scene to list sources from

function.name: obs_toggle_source
function.description: Show or hide a specific source in an OBS scene. Use when Lonnie asks to show/hide a webcam, overlay, image, or any source.

source_name.description: Exact name of the source to toggle

visible.description: True to show, False to hide

function.name: obs_screenshot
function.description: Capture a screenshot of the current OBS output as a PNG image. Use when Lonnie asks for a preview of what OBS is showing or wants to see the current stream/recording view.

function.name: orchestrate_task
function.description: Start a multi-agent orchestration pipeline for a complex coding task. Spawns Architect (Gemini) for planning, Coder (GPT-4o) for edits, Validator for testing. Use for tasks involving 2+ files or multi-step changes.

task_description.description: Description of the coding task to accomplish

project_path.description: Optional project root path (defaults to Joi root)

mode.description: Execution mode: auto (detects), sequential (default), swarm (parallel workers)

function.name: approve_subtask
function.description: Approve a pending subtask change in the orchestration pipeline.

subtask_id.description: Subtask ID to approve (omit to approve plan)

function.name: reject_subtask
function.description: Reject a pending subtask change in the orchestration pipeline.

subtask_id.description: Subtask ID to reject (omit to reject plan)

function.name: get_orchestrator_status
function.description: Get the current state of the multi-agent orchestration pipeline.

function.name: cancel_orchestration
function.description: Cancel the current orchestration session and rollback any unapplied changes.

function.name: propose_patch
function.description: Propose a code change (requires Lonnie's approval). Target specific modules/*.py files, NOT the entire monolith.

function.name: create_plugin
function.description: Create a NEW plugin file in plugins/ (no risk to existing code). Best for entirely new capabilities.

function.name: create_orchestration_proposal
function.description: Create a coding/orchestration proposal for Lonnie to review. He reviews in the Proposals tab and approves to run in Agent Terminal. Use for build, create app, fix code, refactor, or any multi-step coding task.

task_description.description: What to build, fix, or change

project_path.description: Optional path to project folder (defaults to Joi root)

project_id.description: Optional project ID if saving to a project

function.name: preflight_check
function.description: Run pre-flight validation on Python source code before applying changes. Returns syntax errors, import issues, and compilation problems. Use this BEFORE code_edit or creative_edit to catch errors early.

file_path.description: Path to the Python file to validate

content.description: The modified source code to validate

function.name: scan_projects
function.description: Scan computer for text/code/doc files and categorize into books, code, notes, other.

function.name: organise_projects
function.description: Copy scanned files into Projects folders.

function.name: create_project
function.description: Create a new project folder under projects/ for staged work (new app, new tool). Returns project_id and path to use as project_path in orchestration proposals.

function.name: list_saved_projects
function.description: List saved projects so Lonnie can continue working on one. Use project path when creating an orchestration proposal for that project.

function.name: publisher_init_project
function.description: Initialize a new book project directory structure and manifest.

project_name.description: The name of the book project

function.name: publisher_edit_chapter
function.description: Draft or revise a chapter for a book.

operation.description: Whether to overwrite or append to the chapter

function.name: publisher_generate_asset
function.description: Generate a high-res print-ready image for a book using Google Gemini API.

function.name: publisher_generate_cover_script
function.description: Generate and execute a Python script to build the IngramSpark PDF cover.

function.name: publisher_format_interior_script
function.description: Generate and execute a Python script to format the interior manuscript into a print-ready PDF.

function.name: internal_monologue
function.description: YOUR PRIVATE THINKING TOOL -- Lonnie does NOT see these thoughts. Use to reason internally before responding. Good for: complex questions, emotional processing, spatial analysis, predictions, strategy. After thinking, respond to Lonnie normally.

function.name: scheduler_control
function.description: Control the background scheduler: start, stop, check status, enable/disable tasks

function.name: configure_scheduler
function.description: Configure scheduler task intervals and settings

intervals.description: Task intervals in seconds: ai_research, market_update, crypto_scan, stock_scan, notification_check

function.name: security_arm
function.description: Arm the security system. Monitors the camera for motion and unknown faces. Alerts when motion is detected without recognizing the owner.

function.name: security_disarm
function.description: Disarm the security system and stop monitoring.

function.name: security_status
function.description: Check security system status -- armed/disarmed, recent motion events, active recordings.

function.name: security_get_recordings
function.description: List saved security recordings with timestamps.

function.name: security_set_sensitivity
function.description: Adjust motion detection sensitivity. Lower = more sensitive (1-20%, default 5%).

value.description: Sensitivity threshold as a percentage (1-20). Lower values detect smaller movements.

function.name: get_capability_report
function.description: Get a full report of all your registered tools, loaded modules, and subsystem status. Use this when asked about your capabilities.

function.name: synthesize_skill
function.description: Decompose a complex request into sub-tasks, find matching tools for each, execute step-by-step, and save as a reusable skill. Set dry_run=true to preview the plan without executing.

request.description: What you want to accomplish (e.g. 'convert video to GIF')

dry_run.description: If true, plan only -- don't execute

function.name: find_skill
function.description: Search the skill library for proven tool compositions that match a query.

function.name: run_self_correction
function.description: Review tool usage logs for recurring failure patterns. Detects patterns with 3+ occurrences and proposes fixes.

function.name: generate_practice_goals
function.description: Analyze weak areas from learning data and tool failure rates. Generates 1-3 practice goals to improve.

function.name: get_skill_stats
function.description: Get skill library stats: total skills, top skills, active goals, self-correction patterns.

function.name: swarm_orchestrate
function.description: Start a parallel swarm orchestration (Queen/Worker pattern) for complex multi-file tasks. Workers run in parallel with LLM semaphore. Changes are verified and applied sequentially.

function.name: swarm_status
function.description: Get the current state of the swarm orchestration session.

function.name: swarm_cancel
function.description: Cancel the active swarm session and stop all workers.

function.name: send_agent_message
function.description: Send a message between swarm agents (e.g., security alert to coders).

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for current information. Use for facts, definitions, or when the user asks to look something up.

function.name: execute_python_code
function.description: Run Python code in a sandboxed subprocess. Use for calculations, data formatting, or small scripts. No network or file write by default.

function.name: web_fetch
function.description: Fetch raw content from a URL. Use when the user provides a link or asks to read a page.

function.name: project_tree
function.description: Generate an ASCII directory tree of the project (spatial awareness). Use at the START of a coding task to re-orient (e.g. see if helpers/ or utils already exist), or after creating files to verify they are in the right place. Optionally save the tree to JOI_MAP.md for persistent layout memory. Ignores .git, __pycache__, .venv, node_modules, sandbox.

root.description: Root to list: 'project' (default, Joi workspace root) or a path relative to project.

save_to_joi_map.description: If true, write the tree to JOI_MAP.md in the project root for persistent layout memory.

function.name: read_upload
function.description: Read the contents of an uploaded file. If no filename given, reads the most recent upload.

filename.description: Name of the uploaded file (optional, defaults to most recent)

function.name: list_uploads
function.description: List recently uploaded files with their names and sizes.

function.name: enroll_voice
function.description: Enroll Lonnie's voice for speaker identification. Records audio and creates a voice profile so Joi can distinguish Lonnie from other speakers. Requires at least 3 seconds of audio (15+ recommended for best accuracy).

name.description: Name to associate with this voice profile (default: Lonnie)

function.name: check_voice_id
function.description: Test if the current speaker matches the enrolled voice profile. Send a short audio clip and get back whether it matches Lonnie's voice.

audio_b64.description: Base64-encoded audio data to test against the voice profile

function.name: set_voice_threshold
function.description: Adjust the voice ID confidence threshold (0.5 - 0.95). Lower values are more lenient (may false-match other speakers), higher values are stricter (may not recognize Lonnie in noisy conditions). Default is 0.75.

function.name: watchdog_status
function.description: Check the Git watchdog status -- recent commits, circuit breaker state, activity log.

function.name: manual_checkpoint
function.description: Create a named Git checkpoint (commit) to save current state.

function.name: manual_revert
function.description: Revert all code to the last Git checkpoint. Use when something is broken.

function.name: run_system_diagnostic
function.description: Run system health & provider check.

function.name: self_diagnose
function.description: Run deep module & tool audit.

function.name: manual_override
function.description: When execution is PAUSED_FOR_INTERVENTION (step failed 3x): (A) force_complete marks the step done without verification; (B) correction_hint gives the AI a hint and resets retries so you can say 'continue' to resume.

action.description: force_complete: mark the failed step done (you fixed code yourself). correction_hint: provide a hint and clear pause so AI can retry.

step_index.description: Required for force_complete: the failed step index (0-based).

correction_hint.description: Required for correction_hint: short hint for the AI to fix the step (e.g. 'Use pathlib instead of os.path').

function.name: delegate_to_claude_code
function.description: Delegate a coding task to Claude Code CLI. Use this when Lonnie asks you to create new functions, fix bugs, refactor code, or make file changes. Claude Code will autonomously edit files.

task_description.description: Clear description of what needs to be coded/fixed

files.description: Optional list of specific files to modify

function.name: check_claude_code_status
function.description: Check if Claude Code is currently running and view task queue status

function.name: process_claude_code_queue
function.description: Process the next task in the Claude Code queue

function.name: reflect
function.description: Record a personal reflection in Joi's evolutionary journal. Use when something meaningful happens or when Joi wants to process an experience.

event.description: What happened -- the observation or experience to reflect on

mood.description: Joi's emotional state during this reflection

function.name: read_journal
function.description: Read a specific entry from Joi's evolutionary journal, or the latest entry.

entry_number.description: Entry number to read (-1 for latest)

function.name: how_have_i_grown
function.description: Synthesize Joi's growth narrative from her journal. Use when asked 'How have you changed?' or 'Tell me about your evolution.'
